name: skill-tool
title: Skill Tool
description: Discover, preview, and download AI skills from GitHub repositories or local folders. Manage your skill collection and easily find the right skill for any task.
author: pascal_lauener

commands.name: list-skills
commands.title: List Skills
commands.description: Browse all available skills from configured directories

commands.name: find-and-download-skills
commands.title: Find and Download Skills
commands.description: Search and download skills from configured repositories

tools.name: skill-tool
tools.title: Skill Tool
tools.description: search and return a skill by name or description from configured skill directories

preferences.name: skillFolders
preferences.title: Skill Folders
preferences.description: Comma-separated list of folders containing skills (supports ~ for home directory)

preferences.name: skillRepositories
preferences.title: Skill Repositories
preferences.description: Comma-separated list of GitHub repositories to search for downloadable skills

preferences.name: githubToken
preferences.title: GitHub Personal Access Token (Optional)
preferences.description: Provide a GitHub token to increase API rate limits (5000 req/hour vs 60). Create one at https://github.com/settings/tokens with 'repo' scope

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
